---
name: Bug report
about: A skill behaved incorrectly or produced a bad output
title: "[skill-name] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Skill

Which skill exhibited the problem? (e.g. `reviewing-plan`, `implementing-tasks`)

## What happened

Describe what the skill did.

## What you expected

Describe what it should have done instead.

## Reproduction

Steps to reproduce — include the input (ticket file, plan file, or diff) if you can share it.

## Mode

- [ ] Collaborative (default)
- [ ] Auto

## Tool

- [ ] Claude Code
- [ ] OpenCode
- [ ] Cursor
- [ ] Other: ___
